title: Add automatic content moderation for study groups

requirements.summary: Display clear error message when study group creation fails due to content moderation
acceptanceCriteria: When the backend rejects a study group due to banned keywords, the frontend displays a toast or alert with a user-friendly error message
The error message clearly states that the description contains inappropriate content
The Create Study Group dialog remains open so the user can edit the description and retry
The error handling uses the existing normalizeICError utility for consistent error display

file_operations.description: Update the handleCreateGroup function to catch and display content moderation errors from the backend. When createStudyGroup fails with a validation error indicating inappropriate content, show a toast message using the existing toast system and keep the dialog open so the user can edit the description. Use the normalizeICError utility from frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts to format the error message consistently. Ensure the error message clearly communicates that the description contains inappropriate or banned content and prompts the user to revise it.
